title: viburnum foetidum var. premnaceum
intro: Viburnum foetidum var. premnaceum, also known as the Indian arrowwood, is a deciduous shrub native to the Himalayas. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, which aid in treating various health issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antibacterial agent. In traditional medicine, Viburnum foetidum var. premnaceum is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its bark, roots, and leaves are used to make herbal remedies.
